_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: transplantation of WT bone marrow cells into germline Nf1 heterozygous, Krox20;Nf1flox/−, mice restored survival comparable to nontumorigenic Krox20;Nf1flox/flox mice
details: Survival restored to comparable levels as nontumorigenic mice when transplanted with WT bone marrow
